data.output:
# Story 6: Artifact Listing — Search, Sort, Filter (FINAL)

## Diagnosis (current state)

**Backend** (`cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_artifacts.go`, `schema.graphql:1950-2230`):
- `artifacts(projectID, first/after/last/before, mediaType, search)` already supports:
  - Server-side `mediaType` — **exact equality** (resolver line 56), so the UI's `image/*` chip currently matches nothing. Existing bug.
  - Server-side `search` over **title + path** (case-insensitive substring).
  - Default sort: by `Path` ascending, hard-coded.
- Artifact node fields available for sort/filter: `id`, `path`, `title`, `mediaType`, `staleness`, `updatedAt`, `ddxFrontmatter` (JSON), `description`, `generatedBy`.
- **Adjacent infra discovered**: `Query.search` is in the schema with `SearchResult.snippet`, but its resolver still panics (`resolver.go:136`). Command palette has reusable scoring/token matching (`resolver_feat008.go:415,1042`). Document detail has client-side overlay search (`documents/[...path]/+page.svelte:17`). Story 6 should reuse the `SearchResult`/snippet contract rather than invent a new one.
- Cursor encodes only artifact ID; sort changes need client to drop `after` and resolver needs deterministic tie-breaker.

**Frontend** (`routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/+page.{ts,svelte}`):
- Filter chips for `mediaType` (URL-persisted, server-side, triggers reload).
- Search box: client-side only over already-loaded edges; URL-persisted via `replaceState`; **does NOT pass `search` to GraphQL** — so search misses anything past the loaded cursor page.
- No sort UI. No staleness filter. No phase/folder/ID-prefix filter. No snippet rendering.
- Reusable URL/load-more patterns exist in beads page (`beads/+layout.svelte:112`).

**FEAT-008** already requires (US-081b at line 390, US-084 at line 539): category chips + URL state (mediaType chips done), full-text across textual content + sidecar metadata + frontmatter (NOT done), snippet highlighting (NOT done).

## Spec changes

**FEAT-008-web-ui.md** — extend US-081b acceptance with sort dropdown, staleness chip, multi-facet composition, URL-state contract; promote US-084 with concrete server-side scope (title+path → +description+frontmatter → +body) and snippet contract via existing `SearchResult.snippet`. Avoid importing the beads "client-side, no round-trip" search language (US-082b at line 440); artifact list is cursor-paginated and must be server-side.

**TD-NNN — artifact full-text search & facet contract** (new): scope decision for content indexing, size caps, text/binary skip rules, deterministic ordering with tie-breaker, and the **facet contract Story 5 must conform to** (URL keys: `q`, `mediaType`, `staleness`, `phase`, `prefix`, `sort`; multi vs single select per facet; GraphQL arg names).

## Implementation surface

### Phase 1 — wire existing capability + sort + staleness (cheap)
- Frontend `q` → GraphQL `search` arg (kill client-side fallback so search covers full set, not just loaded page).
- Fix `mediaType` wildcard semantics: either translate `image/*` to a prefix match in resolver, or remove wildcard chip.
- Add GraphQL `sort: ArtifactSort` enum: `PATH_ASC|PATH_DESC|TITLE_ASC|TITLE_DESC|UPDATED_DESC|UPDATED_ASC|STALENESS`. Every sort uses `(sortKey, id)` tie-breaker.
- Add `staleness: String` arg.
- Frontend: sort dropdown, staleness chip row, URL state for all params, single source of truth in `+page.ts`. Client clears `after` whenever any of `sort/q/mediaType/staleness` changes.

### Phase 2 — metadata search (cheap-medium)
- Extend server `search` to also scan `description` and `ddxFrontmatter` JSON (frontmatter summary already exposed for docs at resolver_artifacts.go:207). No new index.

### Phase 3 — full-text body + snippets (TD-gated)
- Reuse existing `SearchResult.snippet` shape. Add `ArtifactEdge.snippet: String`.
- On-the-fly grep over textual artifacts at query time, size cap (e.g. 256 KB/file), skip binary, deterministic ordering. Document upgrade path to bleve/sqlite-FTS when artifact count exceeds threshold.
- Frontend: snippet rendering with highlighted match terms.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Given I type a query, the search hits the **entire** project (not just loaded page); URL persists `q=`.
- Given I select a sort option, the list reorders, `sort=` persists, pagination resets cleanly with deterministic tie-breaker.
- Given I apply staleness=stale, only stale artifacts show; chip state persists.
- Given I combine `mediaType + staleness + sort + q`, all four compose; pasting the URL reproduces the same view.
- Given I clear all filters, URL resets to `/artifacts`.
- Given the Images chip is selected, `image/png`/`image/svg+xml` artifacts both appear (wildcard fix verified).
- Given Story 5 lands axes (`phase`, `prefix`), they slot into the published facet contract without re-architecture.
- (Phase 3) Given a query matches body text, I see the artifact with a highlighted snippet.

## Tests

**Unit (Go):** `resolver_artifacts_test.go` — sort orderings + tie-breaker stability, staleness filter, search composition (title/path/description/frontmatter), wildcard mediaType match, pagination correctness across filtered+sorted set.

**Unit (Vitest):** URL-state round-trip (parse/serialize) for all params; sort dropdown emits expected query; load-more preserves all query state.

**E2E (Playwright):** `artifacts.spec.ts` — server-side search matches across pages; sort change resets pagination; staleness chip filters; URL copy/reload restores state; (Phase 3) snippet highlight visible.

**Perf (Go bench):** B4a benchmark — 500-artifact fixture with size caps, p95 budget for content search; verify worst-case stays bounded.

## Risks

- **Cursor + filter/sort interaction:** server-side filters/sort invalidate cursors. Mitigation: client drops `after` on any param change; resolver enforces `(sortKey, id)` tie-breaker.
- **Wildcard chip currently broken** — must be fixed in B1, not deferred.
- **Story 5 coupling:** must publish facet contract NOW (in TD-NNN) so Story 5 grouping names don't drift from Story 6 filter URL keys.
- **Search semantics:** simple substring v1; boolean/regex out of scope; document the choice.
- **B4 size:** split into B4a/B4b/B4c (TD+server, GraphQL contract+resolver, frontend+e2e).

## Bead Breakdown

| # | Title | Deps | Tier |
|---|-------|------|------|
| B1 | Fix mediaType wildcard match + wire frontend `q` to server `search` arg + add `sort` enum and `staleness` arg with tie-breaker | none | cheap (deterministic) |
| B2 | Frontend sort dropdown + staleness chips + URL state contract for all filter params; client resets `after` on any param change | B1 | cheap |
| B3 | Publish facet contract (TD-NNN section) + add `phase` / `prefix` filter args + chips wired to Story 5 axes | Story 5 final, B2 | medium |
| B4a | TD-NNN: artifact search semantics (title→path→description→frontmatter→body), size caps, binary skip, deterministic ordering, perf benchmark fixture | B1 | strong (design + measurement) |
| B4b | GraphQL: extend `search` to metadata fields + add `ArtifactEdge.snippet` (reuse `SearchResult.snippet` shape) + resolver tests | B4a | medium |
| B4c | Frontend snippet rendering + highlight + e2e for full-text path and back-navigation | B4b | cheap-medium |

Suggested execution: B1 → B2 in fast lane; B4a kicks off in parallel as a TD; B3 waits on Story 5 final; B4b → B4c gated by B4a.

## Coordination with Story 5

Story 5 defines categorization axes (folder, frontmatter, HELIX phase). Story 6 turns axes into filter facets.

**Action item from codex review:** Story 6 publishes a facet contract NOW (in TD-NNN, before B3) so Story 5 cannot drift:
- URL keys reserved by Story 6: `q`, `mediaType`, `staleness`, `phase`, `prefix`, `sort`.
- Multi vs single select: `mediaType` single (today), `staleness` single, `phase` single, `prefix` multi.
- Source fields: `phase` derived from path prefix `docs/helix/NN-*/`; `prefix` derived from `id` prefix segment (`ADR|SD|FEAT|US|RSCH|...`).
- Filter narrows; Story 5 grouping organizes the remaining set. Both compose without collision.

## Flagged ambiguities (unresolved)

1. **Search scope final v1:** title+path only (today), or title+path+description+frontmatter? Recommendation: ship title+path (B1) then immediately metadata (B4b) — only body text is gated by TD.
2. **Server vs client execution:** decided **server-side** (cursor pagination forces it). Documented.
3. **URL state persistence:** decided **deep-linkable URL** (no session-only state). Documented.
4. **Boolean/regex search:** out of scope v1. Substring only.
5. **Wildcard mediaType:** fix-in-place (translate `image/*` to prefix in resolver) or drop chip — needs decision in B1.
6. **Phase axis source of truth:** path-prefix derivation vs explicit frontmatter field — needs Story 5 alignment.

ID:       ddx-4728ae0f
Title:    Story 6: artifact listing search/sort/filter
Type:     epic
Status:   in_progress
Priority: 2
Labels:   phase:2, story:6
Owner:    erik
Parent:   ddx-b18d9ce6
Desc:     Sub-epic for Story 6. Full plan at /tmp/story-6-final.md. Children listed under this epic carry the testable ACs.
Accept:   All child beads closed. Locked decisions from the planning round honored.

input.command: ddx bead dep tree ddx-4728ae0f 2>&1 | head -30

data.output:
Create a new bead

Usage:
  ddx bead create <title> [flags]

Flags:
      --acceptance string    Acceptance criteria
      --description string   Description
  -h, --help                 help for create
      --labels string        Comma-separated labels
      --parent string        Parent bead ID
      --priority int         Priority (0=highest, 4=lowest) (default 2)
      --set stringArray      Set custom field (key=value, repeatable)
      --type string          Bead type (task, bug, epic, chore)

Global Flags:
      --config string              config file (default is $HOME/.ddx.yml)
      --library-base-path string   override path for DDx library location
  -v, --verbose                    verbose output

input.command:
ddx bead create "Story 6 B1: wire frontend q to server search, fix mediaType wildcard, add sort enum + staleness arg" \
  --parent ddx-4728ae0f \
  --labels "phase:2, story:6" \
  --priority 2 \
  --description "Phase 1 plumbing for Story 6 artifact listing. See /tmp/story-6-final.md.

Changes:
- cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_artifacts.go: translate 'image/*'-style mediaType arg to a prefix match (HasPrefix on 'image/'); current code uses exact equality so the Images chip never matches image/png or image/svg+xml.
- cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql: add 'sort: ArtifactSort' arg on Query.artifacts with enum values PATH_ASC|PATH_DESC|TITLE_ASC|TITLE_DESC|UPDATED_DESC|UPDATED_ASC|STALENESS, plus 'staleness: String' arg.
- Resolver: implement sort with deterministic (sortKey, id) tie-breaker; implement staleness filter; keep existing search (title+path substring, case-insensitive) unchanged in this bead.
- Frontend routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/+page.ts: pass URL 'q' as the GraphQL 'search' arg instead of client-side substring filter on already-loaded edges. Drop the client-side fallback so search covers the full set.
- Frontend +page.svelte: when q/sort/mediaType/staleness change, reset 'after' cursor before reloading.

Out of scope: sort dropdown UI, staleness chip UI, URL state for new params, snippet rendering, body-text search, phase/prefix filters." \
  --acceptance "- mediaType='image/*' returns image/png and image/svg+xml artifacts (resolver test).
- ArtifactSort enum present in schema; each value sorts deterministically with id tie-breaker (resolver test).
- staleness filter narrows result set (resolver test).
- Frontend artifacts page calls GraphQL with 'search' arg from URL 'q' (no client-side filter remaining).
- Changing q/sort/mediaType/staleness clears 'after' cursor.
- 'cd cli && go test -v ./internal/server/graphql/...' passes.
- 'cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun run test' passes." 2>&1 | tail -5

ddx bead create "Story 6 B2: frontend sort dropdown + staleness chips + URL state contract for all filter params" \
  --parent ddx-4728ae0f \
  --labels "phase:2, story:6" \
  --priority 2 \
  --description "Build the artifact-listing filter UI on top of B1's GraphQL surface. See /tmp/story-6-final.md.

Changes (frontend only):
- routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/+page.svelte: add a sort dropdown bound to the new ArtifactSort enum; add staleness chip row (e.g. all/fresh/stale).
- +page.ts: parse and serialize URL keys q, mediaType, staleness, sort. Single source of truth: load() reads URL params; UI updates URL via goto/replaceState; load() reruns with new params.
- Reset 'after' cursor whenever any of q/sort/mediaType/staleness changes.
- Empty/cleared state: when all filters cleared, URL is bare /artifacts (no query string).

URL contract (must match TD-NNN once published in B3): q (string), mediaType (single), staleness (single), sort (single ArtifactSort value)." \
  --acceptance "- Sort dropdown reorders list; URL persists sort=.
- Staleness chip filters; URL persists staleness=.
- q/mediaType/staleness/sort compose; pasting a URL with all four reproduces the same view.
- Clearing all filters returns URL to /artifacts.
- Vitest URL-state round-trip test for parse/serialize of all params.
- Playwright e2e covers: server-side q matches across pages, sort change resets pagination, staleness chip filters, URL copy/reload restores state.
- 'cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun run test && bun run test:e2e' passes." 2>&1 | tail -5

ddx bead create "Story 6 B3: publish facet contract (TD-NNN) + add phase/prefix filter args + chips wired to Story 5 axes" \
  --parent ddx-4728ae0f \
  --labels "phase:2, story:6" \
  --priority 2 \
  --description "Publish facet contract and add Story-5 axes as filters. Depends on Story 5 final + B2.

Changes:
- docs: create TD-NNN technical-decision document (artifact full-text search & facet contract). Pin URL keys: q, mediaType (single), staleness (single), phase (single), prefix (multi), sort (single). Document deterministic (sortKey, id) ordering. Document Phase axis source: path prefix docs/helix/NN-*/. Document Prefix axis source: id prefix segment (ADR|SD|FEAT|US|RSCH|...). Note that filter narrows; Story 5 grouping organizes the remaining set.
- schema.graphql: add 'phase: String' and 'prefix: [String!]' args on Query.artifacts.
- resolver_artifacts.go: implement phase filter (path prefix match) and multi-value prefix filter (id-prefix segment match).
- Frontend: phase chip + prefix multi-chip wired to URL keys. Compose with existing q/mediaType/staleness/sort.

This bead must NOT proceed until Story 5 categorization axes are finalized and B2 has landed." \
  --acceptance "- TD-NNN document committed with URL key reservations and source-of-truth definitions for phase/prefix.
- GraphQL args 'phase' and 'prefix' present and filter results correctly (resolver tests).
- Frontend phase chip and prefix multi-chip persist to URL and compose with other facets (vitest + playwright).
- Story 5 grouping consumes the same axis definitions without renaming.
- All Go and frontend tests pass." 2>&1 | tail -5

ddx bead create "Story 6 B4a: TD-NNN artifact search semantics + size caps + binary skip + deterministic ordering + perf bench fixture" \
  --parent ddx-4728ae0f \
  --labels "phase:2, story:6" \
  --priority 2 \
  --description "Design + measurement bead. Strong-tier work. Depends on B1.

Deliverables:
- Extend TD-NNN (created/owned with B3, but the search-semantics section may land first via this bead) with: search field precedence (title -> path -> description -> frontmatter -> body), per-file size cap (target 256 KB), binary-file skip rule (detect via content sniff or extension allowlist), deterministic ordering when scores tie ((sortKey, id)), and the upgrade-trigger threshold for moving to bleve/sqlite-FTS.
- Add Go benchmark in cli/internal/server/graphql/ that builds a 500-artifact fixture (mix of textual + binary, varied sizes) and measures p95 latency for full-text content search. Document p95 budget in the TD.
- Do NOT implement the resolver-level body search in this bead; that is B4b. This bead lands the design + benchmark harness only." \
  --acceptance "- TD-NNN search-semantics section committed with explicit field precedence, size cap, binary skip, ordering, and upgrade threshold.
- Benchmark file (e.g. resolver_artifacts_bench_test.go) compiles, runs, and reports p95 against 500-artifact fixture.
- Documented p95 budget in TD-NNN matches measured baseline (or explains delta).
- 'cd cli && go test -bench=. -run=^$ ./internal/server/graphql/...' produces output." 2>&1 | tail -5

ddx bead create "Story 6 B4b: extend GraphQL search to metadata fields + add ArtifactEdge.snippet + resolver tests" \
  --parent ddx-4728ae0f \
  --labels "phase:2, story:6" \
  --priority 2 \
  --description "Implement metadata + body search per TD-NNN. Depends on B4a.

Changes:
- resolver_artifacts.go: extend Query.artifacts 'search' to scan description and ddxFrontmatter JSON in addition to title+path (Phase 2 of plan). Then add textual-body grep with the size cap and binary skip rule from TD-NNN.
- schema.graphql: add 'snippet: String' field on ArtifactEdge, reusing the contract from existing SearchResult.snippet (panic-free implementation; do not invent a new shape).
- Resolver populates snippet with the matching context window (with match terms marked, e.g. via existing scoring helper in resolver_feat008.go if reusable).
- Tests: resolver_artifacts_test.go covers title/path/description/frontmatter/body matches; snippet rendering correctness; pagination correctness across filtered+sorted+searched set; deterministic tie-breaker ordering." \
  --acceptance "- search arg matches title, path, description, ddxFrontmatter JSON, and body text (per TD-NNN precedence).
- ArtifactEdge.snippet returned for matches; uses the SearchResult.snippet contract.
- Size cap and binary skip enforced (test with oversize fixture and binary fixture).
- Pagination remains deterministic under filter+sort+search composition.
- 'cd cli && go test -v ./internal/server/graphql/...' passes." 2>&1 | tail -5

ddx bead create "Story 6 B4c: frontend snippet rendering + match highlight + e2e for full-text path" \
  --parent ddx-4728ae0f \
  --labels "phase:2, story:6" \
  --priority 2 \
  --description "Frontend rendering for B4b's snippet field. Depends on B4b.

Changes:
- routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/+page.svelte: render snippet under each artifact row when present; highlight match terms (reuse highlight helper from command palette / document detail overlay if available).
- Houdini GraphQL doc(s): include snippet in the artifacts query selection set; run 'bun run houdini:generate'.
- Playwright e2e in artifacts.spec.ts: query that matches body text shows highlighted snippet; back-navigation from artifact detail preserves filter+search state and snippet display." \
  --acceptance "- Snippets render with visible highlight when q matches body/metadata.
- Generated Houdini types include the new snippet field.
- Playwright e2e: full-text body match shows snippet with highlight; back-navigation preserves URL state.
- 'cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun run test && bun run test:e2e' passes." 2>&1 | tail -5

data.text: Now add dependency edges per the plan: B2→B1, B3→B2, B4a→B1, B4b→B4a, B4c→B4b.

input.content:
Decomposition only — no implementation in this attempt.

This bead (ddx-4728ae0f) is a Story 6 sub-epic. Its acceptance criterion is "All child beads closed", and the linked plan (/tmp/story-6-final.md) explicitly enumerates six sibling work-slices (B1, B2, B3, B4a, B4b, B4c). No children existed prior to this attempt, so the size-check step from execute-bead instructions applies: file the children, do not implement.

Children created (parent=ddx-4728ae0f):

- ddx-8ec3e08e — B1: wire frontend q to server `search`, fix mediaType wildcard match, add `sort` enum + `staleness` arg with deterministic (sortKey, id) tie-breaker. Cheap. No deps.
- ddx-baa1dbf2 — B2: frontend sort dropdown + staleness chips + URL-state contract (q/mediaType/staleness/sort) + reset `after` on param change. Cheap. Deps: B1.
- ddx-d26f65b2 — B3: publish facet contract (TD-NNN) + add `phase`/`prefix` filter args + chips wired to Story 5 axes. Medium. Deps: B2 (and Story 5 final, tracked externally).
- ddx-cc90cee5 — B4a: TD-NNN search semantics + size caps + binary skip + deterministic ordering + perf benchmark fixture. Strong. Deps: B1.
- ddx-df8b992f — B4b: extend GraphQL `search` to description/frontmatter/body + add `ArtifactEdge.snippet` + resolver tests. Medium. Deps: B4a.
- ddx-297f840c — B4c: frontend snippet rendering + match highlight + e2e for full-text path. Cheap-medium. Deps: B4b.

Dependency edges added: B2→B1, B3→B2, B4a→B1, B4b→B4a, B4c→B4b.
Parent updated with --notes referencing the six child IDs.

Suggested execution order (per plan): B1 → B2 in fast lane; B4a kicks off in parallel; B3 waits on Story 5 final + B2; B4b → B4c gated by B4a.

No source files were modified. No commit produced. The parent epic remains open until all six children close.

data.text:
Decomposed Story 6 epic into six child beads with dependency edges, parent note, and rationale file. No implementation; the epic stays open until children close.

- B1 ddx-8ec3e08e (no deps)
- B2 ddx-baa1dbf2 → B1
- B3 ddx-d26f65b2 → B2
- B4a ddx-cc90cee5 → B1
- B4b ddx-df8b992f → B4a
- B4c ddx-297f840c → B4b
